causalAutopsy.notes: The preserved WIP predated the narrowed PULL/AUDIT-only authority and bypassed the local decision-audit hook; this amendment restores gate evidence without broadening runtime behavior.

guardEvidence.howCaught: The lifecycle test refuses any throughput-floor self-action/governor registration and scans the runtime source for redispatch, notify, attention, or sendAuto seams; unit tests separately enforce dual-signal observation and the restart-persisted read breaker.
